config.mobcaphud.title: MobCap HUD Settings
config.mobcaphud.enabled.tooltip: Show or hide the MobCap HUD overlay.
config.mobcaphud.hudX.tooltip: Horizontal position in screen pixels from the left edge.
config.mobcaphud.hudY.tooltip: Vertical position in screen pixels from the top edge.
config.mobcaphud.backgroundOpacity.toolt: Transparency of the dark panel behind the rows.
config.mobcaphud.scale.tooltip: Size of the overlay. Use smaller values for compact HUD layouts.
config.mobcaphud.showMultiplayerNotice.t: Show a short note instead of stale data when connected to a multiplayer server.
config.mobcaphud.showToggleMessage.toolt: Show a brief on-screen message when pressing the HUD toggle key.
config.mobcaphud.spawnGroup.tooltip: Include this spawn group in the HUD overlay.
